---
title: "fieldwork"
filters: 
  - lightbox
lightbox: auto
freeze: auto
---

Fieldwork is one of my favorite things about being a scientist. Pictures never do it justice, but here are some anyway! 


### Mo'orea, French Polynesia 2026
::: {layout="[[1], [1,1,1,1,1,1,1]]"}
![](images/man_1.jpg){group="moorea2026"
description="A stand of *Rhizophora stylosa*; a non-native species in French Polynesia, and a focus for my PhD work."}

![](images/man_nudi.jpg){group="moorea2026"
description="*Hypselodoris tryoni* in the mangroves."}

![](images/coral_man_2.jpg){group="moorea2026"
description="*Pocillopora acuta* growing on a mangrove root."}

![](images/coral_man_6.jpg){group="moorea2026"
description="*Pocillopora acuta* growing on mangrove roots."}

![](images/coral_man_fish.jpg){group="moorea2026"
description="A school of *Mulloidichthys vanicolensis* among the mangroves. I counted 62 individuals in this school."}

![](images/coral_man_7.jpg){group="moorea2026"
description="A cluster of *Pocillopora acuta* growing on mangrove roots."}

![](images/coral_man_1.jpg){group="moorea2026"
description="A cluster of *Pocillopora acuta* hiding behind a mangrove root."}

![](images/coral_man_3.jpg){group="moorea2026"
description="A young *Pocillopora acuta* growing on a mangrove root."}

:::

### Mo'orea, French Polynesia 2025

::: {layout="[[1], [1,1,1,1,1,1]]"}

![](images/auhurra.jpg){group="moorea2025"
description="My mentee, Auhurra, planting experimental corals on the reef."}

![](images/puffer_2.png){group="moorea2025" description="A guineafowl puffer *(Arothron meleagris)* named Meep."}

![](images/auhurra_liv.jpg){group="moorea2025" description="Auhurra and her other mentor, Olivia, outplanting corals."}

![](images/liv.jpg){group="moorea2025"
description="Olivia outplanting corals."}

![](images/puffer_3.jpg){group="moorea2025"
description="Another adorable guineafowl puffer."}

![](images/puffer_1.jpg){group="moorea2025"
description="Yet another guineafowl puffer - can you guess what species I worked on this summer?"}

![](images/toby_1.jpg){group="moorea2025"
description="A toby taking a snail siesta."}

:::

### Mo'orea, French Polynesia 2024

::: {layout="[[1], [1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1]]"}

![](images/coralscape.jpg){group="Mo'orea"
description="Hilton Reef"}

![](images/stingray.jpg){group="Mo'orea"
description="Pink Whiprays at Stingray Flats; both individuals had a five foot wingspan! "}

![](images/blacktip.jpg){group="Mo'orea"
description="Blacktips at Stingray Flats"}

![](images/humpback.jpg){group="Mo'orea"
description="Mother and newborn humpback; PC: Kathryn Scafidi"}

![](images/surfacedive.jpg){group="Mo'orea"
description="Hayden and Ninah after a dive on MRB Reef."}



![](images/colorfulrock.jpg){group="Mo'orea"
description="Fluorescent encrusting coral. PC: Ninah Munk"}


![](images/colorfulrockrock.jpg){group="Mo'orea"
description="Encrusting coral. PC: Ninah Munk"}

:::

### Kruger National Park, South Africa

::: {layout="[[1], [1, 1, 1, 1, 1]]"}

![](images/lion.jpg){group="kruger"}

![](images/roller.jpg){group="kruger"
description="Lilac Breasted Roller"}

![](images/leopard.jpg){group="kruger"
description="Leopard hiding after a successful kill"}

![](images/elephant.jpg){group="kruger"}

![](images/rhino.jpg){group="kruger"
description="Black Rhinoceros"}

![](images/giraffe.jpg){group="kruger"}

:::

### Jack and Laura Dangermond Preserve

::: {layout="[[1], [1, 1, 1, 1, 1]]"}

![](images/bwrise.jpg){group="dangermond"}

![](images/sunrise.jpg){group="dangermond"}

![](images/purple.jpg){group="dangermond"}

![](images/morning.jpg){group="dangermond"}

![](images/rosie.jpg){group="dangermond"
description="Rosie during an auditory survey"}

![](images/bluebird.jpg){group="dangermond"
description="Western Bluebird"}

:::


### Coal Oil Point Nature Reserve

::: {layout="[[1], [1, 1, 1, 1]]"}

![](images/slough.jpg){group="COPR"
}

![](images/acorn.png){group="COPR"
description="Acorn Woodpecker"}

![](images/redwing.png){group="COPR"
description="Red-winged Blackbird"}

![](images/treecorm.png){group="COPR"
description="Cormorant"}

![](images/beltfisher.png){group="COPR"
description="Belted Kingfisher"}

:::
